name: Borani-ye Choghandar
recipeIngredient: 1 t Chopped mint, dill or cilantro (opt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the garlic cloves.
2. In a small bowl, combine the crushed garlic and yogurt. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. If using fresh beets:
a. Place them in a pan of cold water to cover and bring to boil.
b. Simmer until tender enough to be pierced through with a fork (30-60 minutes, depending on size).
c. Drain and rinse under cold running water until cool enough to handle.
d. Slip off the peels and trim any remaining greens. Dice.
4. In a separate pan, sauté onion in butter until golden brown.
5. Mix the onions with diced beets and yogurt.
6. Makes 8 servings.
7. Each serving contains about: 96 calories; 123 milligrams sodium; 11 milligrams cholesterol; 4 grams fat; 12 grams carbohydrates; 4 grams protein; 0.72 gram fiber.
